footer.desc: Providing world-class healthcare with compassion and excellence since 1990.

home.visionDesc: A modern community hospital providing advanced services for a healthier community.
home.ctaDesc: Our directory of expert doctors makes it easy to find the right specialist for your healthcare needs.

depts.title: Medical Departments
depts.desc: We offer a wide range of specialized medical services. Our departments are equipped with the latest technology and staffed by expert professionals.

doctors.title: Find a Doctor
doctors.desc: Search our directory of expert medical professionals to find the right specialist for you.
doctors.noDocs: No doctors found matching your search criteria.

appt.title: Book an Appointment
appt.desc: Schedule your visit with our medical experts easily and quickly.
appt.successMsg: Thank you, {name}. Your appointment for {dept} has been successfully requested for {date} ({time}). We have sent a confirmation email to {email}.

contact.title: Contact & Location
contact.desc: We're here to help. Reach out to us for any inquiries, or find our location easily.
